quick_reference.logline: A dead heiress returns under a false name to reclaim her empire in public.

character_snapshot.name: Nora Hale / Eva Stone
character_snapshot.function: revenge engine; controls the room through stillness

character_snapshot.name: Adrian Vale
character_snapshot.function: ally-threat romance axis; watching before he moves

character_snapshot.name: Celia Hale
character_snapshot.function: public humiliation initiator; performs legitimacy under pressure

episode_briefs.plot_summary: Nora enters the gala as Eva Stone. Celia strikes first in public; Nora deflects. The fight moves to a private corridor; Adrian interrupts — all three know the war has started.
episode_briefs.opening_hook: A stranger walks into a room that buried her — and the woman on the throne doesn't know it yet.
episode_briefs.cold_open_focus: Ballroom in motion, crystal light, Nora alone at the entrance with a champagne glass she does not drink.
episode_briefs.closing_hook: Adrian asks a question only someone inside the family war would dare answer; Nora answers without flinching; he still doesn't look away.
episode_briefs.core_satisfaction_beat: Status reversal — Celia's public dismissal fails clean; Nora takes the social high ground in one line.
episode_briefs.target_emotion: Controlled exhilaration — the audience knows Nora is dangerous before anyone in the room does.

episode_briefs.plot_summary: Nora tracks Miriam Cross, the retired archivist. First meeting is cautious and coded. Miriam opens her portfolio without handing anything over — and names something only an insider would recognize.
episode_briefs.opening_hook: The one witness everyone needs is the one person who chose silence for years.
episode_briefs.cold_open_focus: Institutional waiting room, muffled board session behind a closed door, Miriam alone with a leather portfolio on her lap.
episode_briefs.closing_hook: Miriam says Nora has her mother's way of standing; Nora does not deny it; the folder stays open between them.
episode_briefs.core_satisfaction_beat: Truth drop tease — information is offered as presence, not as a gift yet.
episode_briefs.target_emotion: Tight hope under fear — the key is in the room but not yet turned.

screenplay_markdown:
# 02_英文剧本

## EPISODE 01

[EPISODE BRIEF]
Episode Plot: ...
Opening Hook: ...
Cold Open Focus: ...
Closing Hook: ...
Core Satisfaction: ...
Target Emotion: ...

### SCENE 01.01
Time: Night
Location: INT. HALE CHARITY GALA
Characters: NORA HALE / EVA STONE, CELIA HALE, ADRIAN VALE
Core Event: Celia publicly attempts to socially eject Eva at the entrance; Eva deflects and takes the high ground
Scene Result: Celia is left without a clean move; Adrian clocks that Eva knows something she shouldn't

[OPENING STATE]
The ballroom is in full donor-gala motion. Crystal overhead. Warm gold light with an edge beneath the polish.

Nora steps through the entrance alone. A champagne glass lifted from the nearest tray. She holds it without drinking.

[MAIN BODY]
Celia clocks Eva from across the room. She crosses toward her with the ease of a woman who owns it.

She stops directly in Eva's path.

CELIA
You must be lost.

Nora turns. Unhurried. Holds the look one beat too long.

NORA
Not at all. I came exactly where I was invited.

Celia steps closer, lowering her voice.

CELIA
I don't know who sent you through those doors. But this is a private event.

Nora glances at the room — the donors, the photographers, the cameras — then back at Celia.

NORA
Then you should have locked them better.

A beat. Celia has nothing left to say.

Adrian stands at the edge of the frame, watching. He hasn't moved on.

[SCENE ENDING]
A hotel photographer's camera sweeps across the entrance group — and catches Nora's wrist. The scar. Just for a moment.

scene_crosswalk.core_event: Celia publicly attempts to socially eject Eva at the entrance; Eva deflects and takes the high ground.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: Celia is left without a clean move; Adrian clocks that Eva knows something she shouldn't.

scene_crosswalk.core_event: Celia steers Eva into the private corridor for a harder confrontation; Adrian interrupts before Celia can land the final move.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: All three know the social war has started; the portrait nameplate is caught in frame — the identity tease lands.

scene_crosswalk.slugline: INT. HALE FOUNDATION BOARDROOM ANTECHAMBER - DAY
scene_crosswalk.core_event: Nora finds Miriam Cross waiting outside the board session and makes first contact.
scene_crosswalk.scene_result: Miriam recognizes something she wasn't expecting and chooses to stay — cautiously.
